nodes.label: Dulang Product
nodes.description: Mobile app screenshot of Dulang Smart Warehouse product listing screen. Shows a product verification workflow with tabs: All, Verified, Pending. Lists 'iPhone 14 Pro' (Supplier: grab, Category: SmartPhone, Stock: 20/20, Status: Verified) and 'Samsung Smart TV' (Supplier: blibli, Category: Television, Stock: 0/0, Status: Pending). UI includes search bar, verification progress indicator showing '1 of 2 verified', and bottom navigation with Products, Suppliers, and Profile tabs. App branding shows 'DULANG smart warehouse' in teal/mint color scheme.

nodes.label: Dulang Smart Warehouse App
nodes.description: Mobile warehouse management application with product verification features, supplier tracking, and inventory management.

nodes.label: Medium Clone
nodes.description: Screenshot of a Medium.com landing page clone. Features a centered hero section with serif headline 'Human stories & ideas that matter', a subtitle 'A welcoming place to read, write, and deepen your understanding of the world.', and a dark 'Start reading →' CTA button. Navigation bar shows Medium logo top-left and 'Sign In' / 'Get Started' buttons top-right. Minimal, clean design with light gray background.

nodes.label: Membangun UI yang Konsisten dengan Reusable Component
nodes.author: Prasetyo Adi Wijonarko
nodes.description: Screenshot of a Medium-style article titled 'Membangun UI yang Konsisten dengan Reusable Component' (Building Consistent UI with Reusable Components). Written by Prasetyo Adi Wijonarko, published March 20, 2025, estimated 3 min read. The article is in Indonesian and discusses the problem of UI inconsistency in team development and proposes reusable components as a solution. The layout follows a typical blog/article reading interface with engagement icons (clap, comment, bookmark, share).
nodes.norm_label: membangun ui yang konsisten dengan reusable component

nodes.label: Reusable Component (UI Concept)
nodes.description: The concept of reusable UI components discussed in the article — components that can be reused across pages or team members to ensure visual and functional consistency.

nodes.label: Prasetyo Adi Wijonarko (Author)

properties.description: Landing page screenshot for Snackventure, a snack subscription box service. Features a warm peach/salmon gradient background with illustrated food items (burger, hot dog, chips/fries) connected by dashed circular path lines. Central CTA button reads 'Start your snackventure!' in muted rose/mauve color. Below the button is the brand name 'Snackventure' and tagline 'Savor your adventure, One box at a time!'. Design style is minimalist with black outline illustrations on warm gradient.
key_elements: Tagline - Savor your adventure, One box at a time!
Food illustrations - burger, hot dog, chips

properties.tagline: Savor your adventure, One box at a time!
